HORIZONTAL_PUSH.description: Controlled eccentric, explosive but controlled press.

VERTICAL_PUSH.description: Controlled lowering with powerful overhead press.

HORIZONTAL_PULL.description: Pause briefly at peak contraction before controlled return.

VERTICAL_PULL.description: Emphasize scapular control and full stretch.

SQUAT.description: Slow descent, brief pause at the bottom, controlled ascent.

HINGE.description: Controlled eccentric emphasizing posterior chain loading.

ELBOW_FLEXION.description: Avoid swinging and maximize muscle tension.

ELBOW_EXTENSION.description: Controlled extension with full lockout avoided unless appropriate.

SHOULDER_ABDUCTION.description: Raise under control, lower slowly without momentum.

CALF.description: Pause at both the stretched and contracted positions.

CORE_FLEXION.description: Controlled trunk movement with minimal momentum.

ANTI_EXTENSION.description: Maintain isometric tension throughout the hold.

ROTATION.description: Rotate under control and avoid excessive speed.

CARRY.description: Maintain steady cadence while preserving posture.
